area.description: Operational geography field for area. Use it to filter by branch, service area, timezone, coverage, or assignment region. Allowed enum values: "cartop", "pit", "cabin", "machine room", "landing area", "hoist way".

enumDescriptions.cartop: "cartop" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.
enumDescriptions.pit: "pit" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.
enumDescriptions.cabin: "cabin" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.
enumDescriptions.machine room: "machine room" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.
enumDescriptions.landing area: "landing area" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.
enumDescriptions.hoist way: "hoist way" is an allowed value for area in workinstructions.

action.description: action field used by the workinstructions workflow for lookup, filtering, display, reporting, or business logic. Allowed enum values: "media", "checkbox".

enumDescriptions.media: Requires image/file evidence or reference media.

media_detail.description: Media/document field for media detail. It usually stores a MediaObject or legacy string key used to retrieve uploaded evidence, receipts, signatures, or reference files.

isDeleted.description: Boolean flag for is deleted. Use it to include/exclude records or determine whether a workflow condition is enabled.

designations.description: ObjectId reference to designations. Use this field to join workinstructions with designations and to filter records that belong to a specific related record.

tools.description: ObjectId reference to resourceitems. Use this field to join workinstructions with resourceitems and to filter records that belong to a specific related record.

machinery.description: ObjectId reference to resourceitems. Use this field to join workinstructions with resourceitems and to filter records that belong to a specific related record.

materials.description: ObjectId reference to resourceitems. Use this field to join workinstructions with resourceitems and to filter records that belong to a specific related record.

deletedDesignations.description: Boolean flag for deleted designations. Use it to include/exclude records or determine whether a workflow condition is enabled.

deletedTools.description: Boolean flag for deleted tools. Use it to include/exclude records or determine whether a workflow condition is enabled.

deletedMachinery.description: Boolean flag for deleted machinery. Use it to include/exclude records or determine whether a workflow condition is enabled.

deletedMaterials.description: Boolean flag for deleted materials. Use it to include/exclude records or determine whether a workflow condition is enabled.

service.description: ObjectId reference to services. Use this field to join workinstructions with services and to filter records that belong to a specific related record. This field is required by the schema.

createdAt.description: Creation/start timestamp for this record. Use it for time-range filters, sorting newest/oldest records, and audit timelines.

updatedAt.description: Last update/last-seen timestamp for this record. Use it to detect recent changes, stale data, and audit recency.

relations.description: designations references a document in designations.
tools references a document in resourceitems.
machinery references a document in resourceitems.
materials references a document in resourceitems.
service references a document in services.
